HeroSection.title: The Future of Payments, Today.
HeroSection.description: Everpay provides seamless, secure, and innovative payment solutions for businesses of all sizes. Empower your growth with our cutting-edge technology.

FeaturesSection.title: Why Choose Everpay?
FeaturesSection.description: Our platform is built to scale with your business, offering a suite of tools designed for efficiency and growth.
FeaturesSection.feature1Description: Accept payments from anywhere in the world with support for multiple currencies and payment methods.
FeaturesSection.feature2Description: Protect your transactions and customer data with industry-leading encryption and fraud detection.
FeaturesSection.feature3Description: Easily integrate our APIs into your existing systems with comprehensive documentation and developer tools.
FeaturesSection.feature4Description: Gain insights into your sales and customer behavior with powerful, customizable dashboards.
FeaturesSection.feature5Description: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist you with any queries.
FeaturesSection.feature6Description: Our robust infrastructure handles high transaction volumes, ensuring reliability and performance.

StatsSection.title: Trusted by Businesses Worldwide
StatsSection.description: Join thousands of satisfied merchants who rely on Everpay for their payment processing needs.

PaymentPartnersSection.title: Accept All Major Payment Methods
PaymentPartnersSection.description: Everpay supports a wide range of payment options, making it easy for your customers to pay how they prefer.

CheckoutProtectionSection.title: Secure Checkout & Fraud Protection
CheckoutProtectionSection.description: Protect your business and customers with Everpay's advanced security features.

fraudDetection.title: AI-Powered Fraud Detection
fraudDetection.description: Our intelligent algorithms analyze transactions in real-time to identify and block fraudulent activities, minimizing chargebacks and protecting your revenue.

dataEncryption.title: End-to-End Data Encryption
dataEncryption.description: All sensitive payment information is encrypted from the moment it's captured until it reaches its destination, ensuring maximum data security and compliance.

tokenization.title: Tokenization for Enhanced Security
tokenization.description: Replace sensitive card data with unique tokens, reducing your PCI DSS scope and protecting customer information from breaches.

3dSecure.title: 3D Secure 2.0 Support
3dSecure.description: Implement an additional layer of security for online credit and debit card transactions, reducing fraud and liability shifts.

BusinessTypesSection.title: Solutions for Every Business Type
BusinessTypesSection.description: Whether you're a startup or an enterprise, Everpay has tailored solutions to meet your unique payment needs.
BusinessTypesSection.ecommerceDescription: Optimize your online checkout experience with seamless integrations and global payment options.
BusinessTypesSection.retailDescription: Streamline in-store payments with our robust POS systems and integrated payment terminals.
BusinessTypesSection.marketplaceDescription: Manage complex payment flows for multiple vendors with our flexible marketplace solutions.
BusinessTypesSection.saasDescription: Automate recurring billing and subscription management with our powerful recurring payment tools.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Payments?
cta.description: Join Everpay today and experience the future of secure and efficient payment processing.

ContactPage.title: Contact Us
ContactPage.description: Have questions or need assistance? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactPage.successMessage: Your message has been sent successfully!
ContactPage.errorMessage: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.description: Learn more about Everpay and our mission to revolutionize payments.
AboutPage.missionDescription: To empower businesses worldwide with innovative, secure, and seamless payment solutions.
AboutPage.teamDescription: Meet the dedicated individuals driving Everpay's success.

ApiPage.title: API Reference
ApiPage.description: Explore our comprehensive API documentation for seamless integration.
ApiPage.intro: Our API is designed for developers to easily integrate Everpay's powerful payment processing capabilities into their applications. With clear documentation and robust endpoints, you can quickly get started with accepting payments, managing transactions, and more.

BlogPage.title: Our Blog
BlogPage.description: Stay up-to-date with the latest news, insights, and trends in the payment industry.

CareersPage.title: Careers at Everpay
CareersPage.description: Join our growing team and help us shape the future of payments.
CareersPage.reason1: Innovative Environment: Work on cutting-edge payment technologies.
CareersPage.reason2: Growth Opportunities: Develop your skills and advance your career.
CareersPage.reason3: Collaborative Culture: Be part of a supportive and diverse team.

CommercePage.title: Commerce Solutions
CommercePage.description: Tailored payment solutions for your e-commerce business.
CommercePage.intro: Everpay's commerce solutions are designed to provide a seamless and secure checkout experience for your online customers. Increase conversion rates and reduce cart abandonment with our optimized payment flows.

CookiePolicyPage.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicyPage.description: Understand how Everpay uses cookies on our website.
CookiePolicyPage.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them, the types of cookies we use, how third-parties we partner with may use cookies on the Service, your choices regarding cookies and further information about cookies.
CookiePolicyPage.whatAreCookiesContent: Cookies are small pieces of text sent by your web browser by a website you visit. A cookie file is stored in your web browser and allows the Service or a third-party to recognize you and make your next visit easier and the Service more useful to you.
CookiePolicyPage.howWeUseCookiesContent: When you use and access the Service, we may place a number of cookies in your web browser. We use cookies for the following purposes: to enable certain functions of the Service, to provide analytics, to store your preferences, to enable advertisements delivery, including behavioral advertising.
CookiePolicyPage.typesOfCookies: What are your choices regarding cookies?
CookiePolicyPage.typesOfCookiesContent: If you'd like to delete cookies or instruct your web browser to delete or refuse cookies, please visit the help pages of your web browser. Please note, however, that if you delete cookies or refuse to accept them, you might not be able to use all of the features we offer, you may not be able to store your preferences, and some of our pages might not display properly.

DocsPage.title: Documentation
DocsPage.description: Find guides, tutorials, and API references to integrate Everpay.
DocsPage.intro: Our comprehensive documentation provides everything you need to integrate Everpay into your applications. From quick-start guides to detailed API references, you'll find all the resources to get up and running quickly.

FraudPreventionPage.title: Fraud Prevention
FraudPreventionPage.description: Protect your business from fraudulent transactions with Everpay's advanced tools.
FraudPreventionPage.intro: Fraud is a constant threat to businesses. Everpay offers a robust suite of fraud prevention tools designed to protect your revenue and maintain customer trust. Our solutions leverage machine learning and industry best practices to identify and block suspicious activities.

GatewayPage.title: Payment Gateway
GatewayPage.description: Secure and reliable payment gateway for all your transaction needs.
GatewayPage.intro: Everpay's payment gateway provides a secure and efficient way to process online transactions. Our robust infrastructure ensures high availability and fast processing times, giving your customers a smooth checkout experience.

HelpPage.title: Help Center
HelpPage.description: Find answers to common questions and get support.
HelpPage.faq1Question: How do I set up an Everpay account?
HelpPage.faq1Answer: You can sign up for an Everpay account directly on our website by clicking the 'Sign Up' button.
HelpPage.faq2Question: What payment methods do you support?
HelpPage.faq2Answer: We support all major credit cards, debit cards, and popular digital wallets like Apple Pay and Google Pay.
HelpPage.faq3Question: How long does it take to process a payment?
HelpPage.faq3Answer: Most payments are processed instantly, though some may take up to 2-3 business days depending on the payment method.

IssuingPage.title: Card Issuing
IssuingPage.description: Create and manage your own branded payment cards with Everpay.
IssuingPage.intro: Everpay's card issuing platform allows businesses to create and manage their own branded physical and virtual cards. This gives you greater control over your spending, streamlines expense management, and opens up new revenue streams.

OnlinePaymentsPage.title: Online Payments
OnlinePaymentsPage.description: Accept payments seamlessly on your website or app.
OnlinePaymentsPage.intro: Everpay's online payment solutions make it easy for your customers to pay, no matter where they are. Our secure and flexible APIs allow you to integrate payment processing directly into your website or mobile application, offering a smooth and reliable checkout experience.

PartnersPage.title: Partnerships
PartnersPage.description: Collaborate with Everpay to expand your reach and offer more value.
PartnersPage.intro: Everpay is committed to building strong partnerships that drive mutual growth and innovation. Whether you're a technology provider, a financial institution, or a business consultant, we offer various partnership programs designed to help you succeed.
PartnersPage.type1: Technology Partners: Integrate Everpay into your software solutions.
PartnersPage.type2: Referral Partners: Earn commissions by referring clients to Everpay.
PartnersPage.type3: Strategic Alliances: Collaborate on joint ventures and market expansion.

PaymentsPage.title: Payment Solutions
PaymentsPage.description: Comprehensive payment processing for businesses of all sizes.
PaymentsPage.intro: Everpay offers a full suite of payment solutions designed to simplify how you accept, process, and manage payments. From online transactions to in-store purchases, our platform provides the tools you need to grow your business securely and efficiently.

PosPage.title: POS Solutions
PosPage.description: Modern and efficient Point-of-Sale systems for in-store payments.
PosPage.intro: Everpay's POS solutions are designed to streamline your in-store operations and enhance the customer experience. Our flexible and secure systems support various hardware options and integrate seamlessly with your existing business tools.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.description: Learn how Everpay collects, uses, and protects your data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.intro: At Everpay, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.
PrivacyPolicyPage.info1: Personal Data: Name, email address, phone number, payment information.
PrivacyPolicyPage.info2: Usage Data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent on site.
PrivacyPolicyPage.use1: To provide and maintain our Service.
PrivacyPolicyPage.dataSecurityContent: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information when you place an order or enter, submit, or access your personal information.

SecurityPage.title: Security at Everpay
SecurityPage.description: Our commitment to protecting your data and transactions.
SecurityPage.intro: Security is at the core of everything we do at Everpay. We employ industry-leading practices and technologies to ensure that your data and transactions are always protected. Our robust security framework is designed to safeguard against threats and maintain the trust of our users.
SecurityPage.measure1: PCI DSS Compliance: Adherence to the highest payment security standards.
SecurityPage.measure2: Encryption: All sensitive data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
SecurityPage.measure3: Fraud Detection: Advanced machine learning models to detect and prevent fraud.
SecurityPage.measure4: Regular Audits: Continuous security assessments and penetration testing.

SolutionsBusinessPage.title: Business Solutions
SolutionsBusinessPage.description: Tailored payment solutions for businesses of all sizes.
SolutionsBusinessPage.intro: Everpay offers comprehensive payment solutions designed to meet the diverse needs of businesses, from startups to large enterprises. Our platform simplifies payment processing, enhances security, and provides valuable insights to help you grow.

SolutionsEcommercePage.title: E-commerce Solutions
SolutionsEcommercePage.description: Seamless online payment processing for your e-commerce store.
SolutionsEcommercePage.intro: Everpay's e-commerce solutions are built to maximize your online sales. Provide your customers with a smooth, secure, and fast checkout experience, while you benefit from advanced fraud protection and comprehensive reporting.

SolutionsMarketplacePage.title: Marketplace Solutions
SolutionsMarketplacePage.description: Manage complex payment flows for multi-vendor platforms.
SolutionsMarketplacePage.intro: Everpay's marketplace solutions simplify payment processing for multi-vendor platforms. Handle complex payouts, manage commissions, and ensure secure transactions for all parties involved, allowing you to focus on growing your marketplace.

SolutionsRetailPage.title: Retail Solutions
SolutionsRetailPage.description: Robust POS systems and in-store payment solutions.
SolutionsRetailPage.intro: Everpay's retail solutions provide modern and efficient ways to accept payments in your physical stores. Our POS systems are designed for speed, reliability, and ease of use, enhancing the in-store experience for both your staff and customers.
SolutionsRetailPage.feature1: Accept all card types and mobile payments

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.description: Read Everpay's terms and conditions for using our services.
TermsPage.intro: Welcome to Everpay! These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your access to and use of the Everpay website, products, and services ('Service'). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
TermsPage.acceptanceContent: By creating an account or using our Service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, as well as our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.
TermsPage.changesContent: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
TermsPage.userAccountsContent: When you create an account with us, you must provide us with information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account on our Service.
